close_reason: Added Debug impl with finish_non_exhaustive, redacting internal state
description: lib.rs:100-107 pub struct WolfHsmBackend has no derive or impl of Debug. Same finding filed P2 against pkcs11 (crate-secretsx-nde2.15). Public types should derive Debug unless there is a reason not to. WolfHsmState contains a wolfhsm::Client which may not be Debug — derive on WolfHsmBackend with a manual #[derive] gated on field types or a hand-written impl that prints {label, server, client_id, state: <opaque>}.
title: WolfHsmBackend lacks Debug impl; downstream logging hindered
